sections.description: Global CSS styles including CSS custom properties and base element reset.
sections.purpose: Define the dark theme color palette via CSS custom properties (:root variables) and apply base reset styles. Imported once in main.ts; component-specific styles use <style module> in SFCs.
strengths: CSS custom properties enable consistent theming across all components
Minimal reset — only box-sizing, margin, padding
weaknesses: Media query breakpoints duplicated from original HTML; could be extracted to variables
sections.functionality:
- :root CSS custom properties: --bg, --surface, --border, --text, --text-muted, --accent, --green, --orange, --red, --purple, --pink
- Global reset: box-sizing border-box, zero margin/padding
- Body: dark background, system font stack, 1.5rem padding
- Form elements: dark-themed select styling with accent focus
- Table: full-width, collapsed borders, muted headers, tabular-nums for numeric cells
- Responsive: @media (max-width: 500px) adjusts grid and card layouts
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| global.css | CSS custom properties, base reset, form/table styles, responsive breakpoints |
